internal_stage_commands: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; REPO=/bridge-arch-001/private-stage; SID={session_id}; mkdir -p "$REPO/staged/$SID"; rsync -a --delete {bundle_dir}/ "$REPO/staged/$SID/"; cd "$REPO"; git add staged/$SID; git commit -m "stage $SID {final_hash}" || true; git push'

bash -lc 'test -n "${BRIDGE_ARCH_PRIVATE_SLACK_WEBHOOK:-}" && curl -sS -X POST -H "Content-type: application/json" --data "{\"text\":\"[Bridge Arch] Internal staging ready: {session_id} | {outcome} | {final_hash} | expected signer {expected_steward_key_fingerprint}\"}" "$BRIDGE_ARCH_PRIVATE_SLACK_WEBHOOK" >/dev/null || true'
sync_before_release_commands: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; REPO=/bridge-arch-001/private-stage; cd "$REPO"; git pull --ff-only'
public_release_commands: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; REPO=/bridge-arch-001/public-release; SID={session_id}; mkdir -p "$REPO/releases/$SID"; rsync -a --delete {public_dir}/ "$REPO/releases/$SID/"; cp -f {confirmation_json} "$REPO/releases/$SID/steward_confirmation.json"; cd "$REPO"; git add releases/$SID; git commit -m "release $SID {final_hash}" || true; git push'

bash -lc 'test -n "${BRIDGE_ARCH_PUBLIC_SLACK_WEBHOOK:-}" && curl -sS -X POST -H "Content-type: application/json" --data "{\"text\":\"[Bridge Arch] Public release authorized: {session_id} | {outcome} | {final_hash} | signer {steward_key_fingerprint}\"}" "$BRIDGE_ARCH_PUBLIC_SLACK_WEBHOOK" >/dev/null || true'
